World Athletics Federation
World Athletics, commonly known as the World Athletics Federation, is the international governing body for the sport of athletics. It oversees a wide range of athletic events and competitions, with a particular focus on the World Athletics Championships. The federation's primary responsibilities include validating world records to ensure that all achievements meet the necessary standards and criteria.

World Athletics plays a crucial role in setting rules and regulations for various disciplines such as track and field events, cross country running, road running, race walking, and more. By maintaining high standards of competition and record-keeping, World Athletics aims to promote the sport globally and foster fair play among athletes worldwide. The organization's efforts are directed towards ensuring that athletic competitions are conducted with integrity and transparency, thereby enhancing the credibility and appeal of the sport on an international scale.

The federation is responsible for overseeing the World Athletics Championship and validating world records. This involves meticulous record-keeping and adherence to strict criteria to ensure the authenticity and fairness of athletic achievements.<SEP>The World Athletics Federation is the governing body overseeing the World Athletics Championship and record validations.<SEP>The World Athletics Federation is the governing body overseeing the World Athletics Championship and record validations.<SEP>The World Athletics Federation is the governing body overseeing the World Athletics Championship and record validations.<SEP>The World Athletics Federation is the governing body overseeing the World Athletics Championship and record validations.

Splunk
Splunk is a versatile software tool primarily utilized for monitoring and analyzing machine-generated data. It plays a crucial role in various operational contexts, including onsite work and weekly maintenance tasks. The system is designed to handle specific versions and maintenance requirements, ensuring optimal performance through regular updates such as IP adjustments and package upgrades. For instance, Splunk was upgraded from version 9.3.3 to 9.3.8 during a maintenance process.

Splunk's functionality extends beyond mere data analysis; it also involves managing roles with specific abilities. These roles include admin and es_admin_user, each with distinct permissions tailored to different operational needs. This granular control over user roles and permissions allows for precise management of access and functionalities within the system. The software requires onsite maintenance and user permission adjustments, as well as certificate updates and path modifications for normal operation.

In addition to its technical capabilities, Splunk is associated with maintenance tasks such as 12月月維護 (December monthly maintenance), highlighting its importance in ongoing operational support. The software's comprehensive approach to data monitoring and analysis makes it an essential tool for organizations seeking to leverage machine-generated data effectively. It is used by E客戶 and requires regular updates.

Splunk is also a data analysis platform used to process and analyze events, including PA traffic events. As a monitoring system, Splunk was adjusted to ensure all files, even those with similar content, are fully ingested. This ensures that the data analyzed is comprehensive and accurate, further enhancing its utility in various operational contexts.<SEP>Splunk is a company whose onsite work is part of the maintenance record.<SEP>Splunk is a software tool used for monitoring and analyzing machine-generated data, with specific roles and permissions managed by A部門.<SEP>Splunk is a software tool that underwent version upgrades from 9.3.1 to 9.3.3 during the maintenance process.<SEP>Splunk is an organization whose weekly onsite activities are being described.

A部門
A部門 is a specialized department within an organization, primarily focused on managing various aspects of Splunk, a popular platform for searching, monitoring, and analyzing machine-generated big data via a web-style interface. A部門's responsibilities are multifaceted and include several key areas:

One of the primary functions of A部門 is to adjust user roles and permissions within Splunk. This task is crucial for facilitating analysis by HANK, ensuring that users have the appropriate access levels to perform their duties effectively. Additionally, A部門 handles IP adjustments, package upgrades, NTP service checks, KVstore certificate checks, and the sending of reports. These activities are essential for maintaining the integrity and functionality of the Splunk environment.

A部門 is also deeply involved in account inventory and report generation. This includes maintaining Splunk accounts and verifying services to ensure that all accounts are up-to-date and operational. The department's role extends to handling PA reports and other maintenance tasks, which are critical for the smooth operation of the organization's systems. Furthermore, A部門 is responsible for addressing PA report email issues and other related tasks, demonstrating their comprehensive involvement in Splunk-related activities.

In summary, A部門 plays a pivotal role in managing and maintaining the Splunk environment within the organization. Their responsibilities encompass a wide range of tasks, from user permissions and account management to system maintenance and reporting, all aimed at ensuring the efficient operation of Splunk and supporting the analytical needs of users like HANK.

B部門

Pice Logs
Pice logs are files that were missing and required handling due to similar content being automatically judged as identical by Splunk.

NTP服務refers to the Network Time Protocol service that was checked for activation on various hosts.

KVstore憑證
KVstore憑證are certificates associated with the KV store, which were checked and renewed as part of the maintenance tasks.

M365網址

10.0.2 (2025.11.14)

DEP02主機

CDIBHMGT02

KGIBIDX04

10.0.1/2025.09.25

Rsyslog轉送設定

Clean.sh資料留存區間
Clean.sh資料留存區間refers to the data retention interval adjusted in clean.sh script from 12 hours to 6 hours for periodic cleaning of old data.

Audit資料

Messages-20251214檔案
Messages-20251214檔案is a log file that was deleted to immediately release space.

Logrotate排程監控
Logrotate排程監控is a scheduled monitoring setup for log rotation, checking every 2 hours and rotating files exceeding 1G, retaining 30 files with automatic compression.

UAT
UAT refers to User Acceptance Testing, one of the environments where Splunk was adjusted.

Production
